2022-T2-P1-S7.trunk: be+不定式表语(not…but…)：This is not to say … but rather (to) stress …（这并非要说…而是要强调…）
structure: 主句：This is not to say that … but rather stress that …, that … and that …
├ not…but… 并列不定式表语：not to say… but (to) rather stress…
├ say 的宾语从句(that)：that there is no point in getting a degree
└ stress 的三个并列宾语从句(that…, that… and that…)：that a degree is not for everyone / that the switch from classroom to lecture hall is not an inevitable one / that other options are available
2022-T2-P1-S7.logic: This is not to say… but rather (to) stress…（be + 不定式表语，not…but… 并列）；say + that 宾语从句；stress + 三个并列 that 宾语从句。
notes: This is not to say … but rather (to) stress …：not…but… 并列不定式作表语（这并非要说…而是要强调…）。
stress that…, that… and that…：stress 后三个并列 that 宾语从句。
there is no point in getting a degree：there be no point in doing（做…没有意义）。

2022-T2-P1-S1.trunk: 时间从句+形式主语：As …, it may be worth considering …（当…时，或许值得思考…）
structure: 时间状语从句(As)：As the latest crop of students pen their undergraduate application form and weigh up their options（并列谓语 pen / weigh up）
主句（形式主语 it）：it may be worth considering just how … and what …
├ 真正主语(动名词)：considering just how the point, purpose and value of a degree has changed and what Generation Z need to consider
│   └ 并列宾语从句(how… and what…)：how … has changed / what Generation Z need to consider
└ 时间状语从句(as)：as they start the third stage of their educational journey
2022-T2-P1-S1.logic: As 时间从句（并列谓语 pen/weigh up）；主句 it 形式主语，worth considering（动名词）后接 how… and what… 并列宾语从句；as they start… 时间状语。
notes: it may be worth considering…：it 形式主语，worth + 动名词（值得考虑…）。
how … has changed and what … need to consider：considering 后两个并列宾语从句。
As… 与 as they start…：两处时间状语从句（当…时）；pen 作动词=书写。

2022-T2-P1-S16.trunk: 形式主语 It + that 主语从句(被动)：It has been estimated that …（据估计…）
structure: 主句（形式主语 It）：It has been estimated that …
└ 主语从句(that)：this generation … will work for 17 different employers … and have five different careers
├ 插入（原因状语）：due to the pressures of technology, the wish for personal fulfilment and desire for diversity
└ 并列谓语：will work for… and have…
2022-T2-P1-S16.logic: It has been estimated that…（it 形式主语 + 被动；真正主语是 that 从句）；that 从句主语 this generation（due to… 插入）+ 并列谓语 will work… and have…。
notes: It has been estimated that…：it 形式主语 + 被动；真正主语是 that 从句。
due to…：插入的原因状语，夹在主语 this generation 与谓语之间（主谓分隔）。
will work for… and have…：that 从句内的并列谓语；over the course of 在…期间。
